prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 4B11T (2.0L MIVEC turbo) internals with forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm, 9.0:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, paired with a billet crankshaft from Tomei to handle 600+ HP reliably. Upgrade the valvetrain with Tomei Type-A titanium retainers, Supertech dual valve springs, and Kelford 272° cams for optimized airflow at high RPM.

Turbocharger: Swap the stock TD05H-15GK20 turbo for a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe and a Tomei 4-inch titanium exhaust system, including a GReddy Revolution RS cat-back for reduced backpressure and aggressive sound.

Drivetrain & Cooling: Install a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the front and a Cusco 2-way Type-MZ differential in the rear, paired with a PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset. Upgrade the cooling system with a Koyorad 53mm aluminum radiator, a Setrab 50-row oil cooler, and a GReddy intercooler with a 3.5-inch core for sustained power under track conditions.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders, a custom 3D-printed front splitter (extended 3 inches), and a Voltex Type-5 rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber endplates for high-speed stability. Replace the stock hood with a Seibon carbon fiber vented unit to improve heat extraction.

Wheels & Stance: Mount a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 in 18x10.5 +15 ET (front) and 18x11 +18 ET (rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Lower the car with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear springs) and add Cusco pillowball upper mounts for precise alignment adjustments.

Interior & Details: Replace the stock seats with Bride Zeta III Low Max seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (MOTEC-certified, 6-point bolt-in). Add a Defi Advance BF gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod, and wrap the interior trim in Alcantara with red contrast stitching from Status Racing.
